Home / Services / Residential Window Replacement

Residential Window Replacement

Enhance your home's beauty and efficiency with our professional residential window replacement services.

Manuel's Glass specializes in residential window replacement, catering to the diverse architectural styles found throughout Long Beach, from the classic Craftsman bungalows of Belmont Shore to the modern condos near Shoreline Village. We understand the importance of selecting the right windows to complement your home's aesthetic while providing superior energy efficiency and protection from the elements. Our team will guide you through the selection process, considering factors like window type (double-hung, casement, sliding), frame material (vinyl, wood, aluminum), and glass options (low-E, tempered, laminated) to ensure optimal performance and longevity. We handle every aspect of the project, from precise measurements and removal of old windows to expert installation and meticulous cleanup. We also address specific Long Beach concerns like soundproofing for homes near busy streets and UV protection to prevent fading of interior furnishings. Trust Manuel's Glass to transform your home with beautiful, energy-efficient windows that enhance its value and comfort.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: In-Home Consultation: We assess your needs and provide a detailed quote.
  2. 02 Step 2: Window Selection: Choose from our wide range of high-quality windows.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Installation: Our skilled team ensures a precise and efficient installation.
  4. 04 Step 4: Final Inspection: We ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished project.

Benefits

  • Improved energy efficiency
  • Enhanced home aesthetics
  • Increased property value
  • Reduced noise pollution

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical window replacement project take?

Most residential window replacement projects take between one to three days, depending on the number of windows and the complexity of the installation. We always strive to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

What type of windows are best for energy efficiency in Long Beach?

Low-E glass windows with insulated frames are highly recommended for Long Beach homes. They help reduce heat transfer, keeping your home cooler in the summer and warmer in the winter, which can lead to significant energy savings.

Do you offer any warranties on your window replacement services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both the windows themselves and our installation services. We stand behind our workmanship and are committed to ensuring your complete satisfaction.

Get a Free Estimate
